name: Oat-Peach Muffins
recipeIngredient: 2 Egg whites or 1/4 cup (cholesterol-free) egg product
1 cup Chopped fresh, frozen (thawed) or canned (well-drained) peaches
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 400°F.
2. Spray the bottoms of 12 medium muffin cups, each measuring 2 1/2 x 1 1/4 inches, with nonstick cooking spray, or line them with paper baking cups.
3. In a large bowl, mix together the oats and buttermilk.
4. Beat in the brown sugar, oil, molasses, vanilla, and egg whites until combined.
5. Stir in the remaining ingredients except peaches until just moistened (the batter will be lumpy).
6. Fold in the peaches. Divide the batter evenly among the muffin cups.
7. If desired, sprinkle the batter with sugar.
8. Bake for about 20 minutes or until golden brown.
9. Remove from the pan.
